nasb.text: And the demons came out of the man and entered the swine; and the herd rushed down the steep bank into the lake and was drowned.

esv.text: Then the demons came out of the man and entered the pigs, and the herd rushed down the steep bank into the lake and drowned.

cnv.text: 鬼就從那人身上出來，進入豬群，豬群闖下山崖，掉在海裡淹死了。

ccb.text: 于是那群鬼便离开那人，进入猪群。那群猪就一路奔下陡坡，冲进湖里淹死了。

csbs.text: 鬼魔就从那个人身上出来，进入猪里面。于是那群猪从山崖冲到湖里淹死了。
